local-dry-run.notes: No model call. Used for deterministic smoke tests.

local-file-writer.notes: No model call. Writes scoped quest files so the dashboard demo produces real artifacts without provider keys.

9router-local.label: 9Router local
9router-local.notes: Local 9Router OpenAI-compatible endpoint. 9Router owns provider keys, quota, combo routing, and fallback.

opencode-cli.notes: OpenCode CLI transport. It may use local OpenCode config or model-specific provider env vars.

openrouter-http.notes: OpenRouter gateway transport using OpenAI-compatible chat completions.

gemini-api.notes: Gemini OpenAI-compatible API path. The backend can fall back to Gemini CLI if no API key is present.

gemini-cli.notes: Gemini CLI fallback for locally authenticated sessions.

cerebras-http.label: Cerebras
cerebras-http.notes: Added from Provider Lab quick add. Secret value is stored only in ignored local provider secrets.
